hook.text: This is the most overlooked endometriosis symptom. Endometriosis nurse explains why
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: Surprise and validation – presenting a commonly dismissed symptom as crucial
hook.target_audience_raw: People with endometriosis or those suspecting they have it

main_claim.text: Fatigue is the most overlooked symptom of endometriosis, affecting over half of patients.

supporting_explanation.summary: A nurse's study of 100 patients found 95% had fatigue, 70% had painful intercourse, and 80% had painful periods. Fatigue is often dismissed as normal tiredness but is actually due to an ongoing inflammatory process in the body.

funnel_rationale: Awareness education about an overlooked symptom, correcting a common misconception, no direct push toward diagnosis or treatment.
format_raw: single talking head with onscreen text overlay
